desc.p: Welcome to the hub for SUSE’s writing standards. On this page, you can choose two fully maintained guides—one for DocBook XML, the other for AsciiDoc. Both guides answer the same questions about voice, terminology, structure and layout, but each applies rules that fit its own format. Choose your format, follow the conventions, and you’ll make your content clearer for readers, easier for translators and smoother for contributors—no matter which toolchain you prefer.
